title: MTR Low effort SEPTA Metro M-4 & B-IV
description: Low effort SEPTA Metro M-4 & B-IV for MTR mod!
body:
# Low effort SEPTA Metro M-4 & B-IV
SEPTA Metro M-4 & B-IV from retextured M-Train from base mod.
![Septa M-4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98be085f61a8f77d69cf0474c9e65b4a3bce807f_0.webp)
## Trains
- SEPTA Metro M-4 (SEPTA L Line)
- SEPTA Metro B-IV (SEPTA B Line)
## Features
- The trains
- New original motor sounds
- Customised interior seats
